home.title: Notes
home.categorydetail1: Develop a routine and lifestyle that would best serve your goals.
home.categorydetail2: Take charge of your health and fitness, mind, body, and soul.
home.categorydetail3: Nurture the relationships that matter most, including with yourself.
home.categorydetail4: Plan your adventures and capture memories that last forever.
home.getnotified: Get notified at midnight on your note's date
home.addnoteswith: Add notes with future dates from the Calendar tab to get midnight reminders.
home.notificationsareon: Notifications are ON. Future notes will send reminders at midnight on their date.
home.pleaseAllow: Please allow notifications in your device Settings to enable reminders
home.thistempletehelps: This template helps you stay organized and focused on your goals every single day.
home.firstTap: Tap the + button to create your first note
home.noPinNot: No pinned notes. Pin a note to see it here.
home.eachLine: Each line will become a bullet point
home.deleteShort: Are you sure you want to delete this note?
home.removeads:
Remove ads and unlock
premium features.
home.unsavedchanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
home.please_allow_access: Please allow access to save to gallery.
home.please_allow_save_image: Please allow access to save images to gallery.
